reasoning: With the knowledge cutoff at May 22, 2025, there are only 39 days remaining until the July 1, 2025 deadline. Databricks recently closed a massive $10B equity funding round and secured a $5.25B credit facility in early 2025. These monumental private capital raises provide ample liquidity and substitute for an immediate IPO. Typically, an S-1 filing or IPO announcement is preceded by months of leaks regarding the selection of lead banks, yet there has been no such news here. Coupled with an April late-April report stating "no public plans to host an IPO," the likelihood of a sudden announcement in the short remaining window is extremely low.
batch_queries: Before July 1, 2025, will Databricks announce that it is planning an IPO?
